mapper.insert: insert into orders(number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, address, consignee, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status, checkout_time, user_name, cancel_time, rejection_reason, cancel_reason, delivery_time) VALUES (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{consignee}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus}, #{checkoutTime}, #{userName}, #{cancelTime}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelReason}, #{deliveryTime})
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from orders where status = 1 and order_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 15 MINUTE)
select id from orders where status = 4 and estimated_delivery_time <= DATE_SUB(now(),INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
select DATE_FORMAT(checkout_time, '%Y-%m-%d') orderDate, SUM(amount) amount from orders where status = 5 and checkout_time between #{begin} and #{end} group by orderDate
